entries.source: Important events, facts learned, and uncertainty notes stay visible.
entries.value: Imicimbi ebalulekile, amaqiniso afundiwe, namanothi okungaqiniseki ahlala ebonakala.

entries.source: In 4 sentences, explain how one assumption change moves revenue, cash flow, and value. Name one thing you would check before trusting it.
entries.value: Emishweni emi-4, chaza ukuthi ushintsho olulodwa lokucabanga luyinyusa kanjani imali engenayo, ukuhamba kwemali, nenani. Sho into eyodwa ongayihlola ngaphambi kokuyithemba.

entries.source: Increase the challenge. Have the historical person defend their worldview more forcefully while the historian tracks weak claims.
entries.value: Khulisa inselelo. Yenza umuntu womlando avikele umbono wakhe womhlaba ngamandla kakhulu ngenkathi isazi-mlando silandelela izimangalo ezibuthakathaka.

entries.source: Individual crowd interactions are plausible composites
Individual routes through smoke are plausible, not exact
entries.value: Izindlela zomuntu ngamunye phakathi kwentuthu ziyenzeka, hhayi ngqo

entries.source: Interpret the target internally and begin immediately with a real diagnostic question.
entries.value: Humusha okuhlosiwe ngaphakathi bese uqala ngokushesha ngombuzo wangempela wokuxilonga.

entries.source: Invite a figure into the room.
It definitely rises because sales are higher.
It helps you explain profit potential, not just market size.
entries.value: Kukusiza ukuba uchaze amandla enzuzo, hhayi nje usayizi wemakethe.

entries.source: It helps you predict policy, taxes, shortages, and market reactions without memorizing diagrams.
entries.value: Kukusiza ukuba ubikezele inqubomgomo, izintela, ukushoda, kanye nokusabela kwemakethe ngaphandle kokubamba ngekhanda imidwebo.

entries.source: It is impossible to know anything until terminal value is calculated.
entries.value: Akunakwenzeka ukwazi lutho kuze kube yilapho kubalwa inani lokugcina.

entries.source: It lets you revise for logic, not just polish wording.
entries.value: Kukuvumela ukuba ubuyekeze ukuze uthole ukucabanga okunengqondo, hhayi nje ukucwenga amagama.

entries.source: It makes you faster because each test either proves or removes a hypothesis.
entries.value: Kukwenza usheshe ngoba isivivinyo ngasinye siba ubufakazi noma sisusa umbono othile.

entries.source: It may fall because costs and working capital can absorb the sales gain.
entries.value: Kungase kwehle ngoba izindleko kanye nenhloko-mali esebenzayo kungase kudle inzuzo yokuthengisa.

entries.source: Jumps to valuation before reading the operating model.
entries.value: Eqela ekulinganiseni inani ngaphambi kokufunda imodeli yokusebenza.

entries.source: Keep governance, money, labor, technology, and culture in view.
entries.value: Gcina ukubusa, imali, umsebenzi, ubuchwepheshe, namasiko kusemqondweni.

entries.source: Keep the sidecar quieter unless something needs correction.
entries.value: Gcina i-sidecar ithule ngaphandle uma kukhona okudinga ukulungiswa.

entries.source: Kingdom of England under Charles II
Kingdom of France in revolutionary crisis
Learn how they thought, worked, planned, wrote, governed, or experimented.
entries.value: Funda ukuthi babecabanga, basebenza, bahlela, babhala, babusa, noma benza kanjani ucwaningo.

entries.source: Learn supply and demand by working through examples

entries.value: Isimo sezomthetho sithinte impilo yansuku zonke

entries.source: List what has to be true for the idea to work.
entries.value: Bhala phansi lokho okumele kube yiqiniso ukuze umbono usebenze.

entries.source: Listing the five labels without judging their strength does not explain whether the industry is attractive.
entries.value: Ukubala amalebula amahlanu ngaphandle kokwahlulela amandla awo akuchazi ukuthi imboni iyakhanga yini.

entries.source: Literate helper near records, letters, or multilingual exchange
entries.value: Umsizi ofundile oseduze namarekhodi, izincwadi, noma ukushintshana ngezilimi eziningi

entries.source: Livres, sous, bread prices as daily pressure
entries.value: Izimali, amasenti, nezintengo zesinkwa njengengcindezi yansuku zonke

entries.source: Local working language with class-appropriate fluency
entries.value: Ulimi lokusebenza lwasendaweni olunokukhuluma okufanele isigaba

entries.source: Lock useful notes only after the idea has been used.
entries.value: Khiya amanothi awusizo kuphela ngemva kokuba umqondo ususetshenzisiwe.

entries.source: Look for the causal link. Which variable actually changed, and what does it affect next?
entries.value: Funa isixhumanisi esiyimbangela. Iyiphi into eguqukile ngempela, futhi ithinta ini ngokulandelayo?

entries.source: Make the first rough structure before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes."
entries.value: Yenza isakhiwo sokuqala esingaphelele ngaphambi kokunikeza iseluleko. Qala ngokuthi: "Ngenze isakhiwo sokuqala esingaphelele. Hlela noma yini. Ngizophendula ezinguqukweni zakho."

entries.source: Manipulation proves you can use the model, not just repeat it.
entries.value: Ukukhohlisa kufakazela ukuthi ungayisebenzisa imodeli, hhayi nje ukuyiphinda.

entries.source: Map allies, enemies, critics, patrons, and pressure groups around this person at this moment.
entries.value: Dweba izimbangi, izitha, abagxeki, abaxhasi, namaqembu anengcindezi azungeze lo muntu ngalesi sikhathi.

entries.source: Market street near Chandni Chowk during the siege
entries.value: Umgwaqo wemakethe oseduze ne-Chandni Chowk ngesikhathi sokuvinjezelwa

entries.source: market, household, workshop, port, school, or neighborhood
entries.value: imakethe, umuzi, indawo yokusebenzela, itheku, isikole, noma umakhelwane

entries.source: Markets move when incentives change. Demand captures willingness to buy, supply captures willingness to sell, and price is where the pressure balances.
entries.value: Izimakethe ziyashintsha uma izisusa zishintsha. Isidingo sikhombisa ukuzimisela ukuthenga, ukunikezwa kukhombisa ukuzimisela ukuthengisa, kanti intengo yilapho ingcindezi ilingana khona.

entries.source: Markets, homes, workshops, courts, maps, and decision points.
entries.value: Izimakethe, amakhaya, izindawo zokusebenzela, izinkantolo, amamephu, nezindawo zokuthatha izinqumo.
Ukwazi kahle = ukukhumbula + ukusebenzisa + impendulo + ukudlulisa.

entries.source: Merge the accepted changes into a clean current version, then update the decision log and open questions.
entries.value: Hlanganisa izinguquko ezamukelwe enguqulweni yamanje ehlanzekile, bese ubuyekeza irekhodi lezinqumo kanye nemibuzo evulekile.

entries.source: Misses become a smaller review deck
Missing the curfew or ignoring official rank can quickly become dangerous.
entries.value: Ukwephula isikhathi sokubuyela ekhaya noma ukungayinaki indawo esemthethweni kungaba yingozi ngokushesha.
Ihlanganisa izinto ezithathelwa indawo nezinye izindlela eziqondile.

entries.source: Modern assumptions about equal citizenship would be immediately out of place.
entries.value: Imibono yesimanje mayelana nokuba yisakhamuzi ngokulingana ingaba yinto engafanele ngokushesha.

entries.source: Modern talk of individual artistic genius can sound naive without patronage, guild, and civic context.
entries.value: Inkulumo yesimanje yobuhlakani bobuciko bomuntu ngamunye ingazwakala iyize ngaphandle kokusekelwa, inhlangano, kanye nesimo somphakathi.

entries.source: More immersive, with tighter limits on what you can know and say.
entries.value: Igcwele kakhulu, inemikhawulo eqinile kulokho ongakwazi nokukusho.

entries.source: Move carefully and notice ordinary life before judging.
entries.value: Hamba ngokucophelela futhi uqaphele impilo evamile ngaphambi kokwahlulela.

entries.source: Move one control, watch the result, then explain why the output changed.
entries.value: Hambisa isilawuli esisodwa, ubuke umphumela, bese uchaza ukuthi kungani okukhiphayo kushintshile.

entries.source: Moving every control at once makes it hard to know what caused the result.
entries.value: Ukuhambisa zonke izilawuli ngesikhathi esisodwa kwenza kube nzima ukwazi ukuthi yini edale umphumela.

entries.source: Moving on after recognition instead of testing recall and transfer.
entries.value: Ukuqhubeka ngemva kokuqaphela esikhundleni sokuhlola ukukhumbula nokudlulisa.

entries.source: Mughal symbolic authority under rebel control, contested by the East India Company
entries.value: Igunya elingokomfanekiso lamaMughal ngaphansi kokulawulwa ngabavukeli, eliphikiswa yi-East India Company

entries.source: Multiple explanations can help, but the proof is what you can do after reading.
entries.value: Izincazelo eziningi zingasiza, kodwa ubufakazi yilokho ongakwenza ngemva kokufunda.

entries.source: Name the input you changed, the immediate effect, and the final result.
entries.value: Qamba okokufaka okushintshile, umphumela osheshayo, kanye nomphumela wokugcina.

entries.source: Name the topic and your current guess. The app builds a ladder of questions, hints, evidence, and synthesis.
entries.value: Qamba isihloko kanye nokuqagela kwakho kwamanje. Uhlelo lokusebenza lwakha isitebhisi semibuzo, amacebo, ubufakazi, nokuhlanganisa.

entries.source: Olive oil, dust, bronze, public argument, and the uneasy pride of a wounded democracy.

entries.source: One short concept chunk at a time, with examples that fit your level.

entries.source: One targeted question tests the current understanding.

entries.source: One tight arrival, three discoveries, and a debrief stamp.
entries.value: Ukufika okukodwa okufushane, okutholakele okuthathu, kanye nesitembu sokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Open the evidence drawer. Label high-confidence facts, plausible reconstructions, contested claims, and things you must not fabricate.
entries.value: Vula idrowa lobufakazi. Beka amalebula amaqiniso aqinisekile, ukwakhiwa kabusha okungenzeka, izimangalo eziphikiswayo, nezinto okungamelwe uziqambe.
